titleStmt.title: SII 41.156: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 156. (A.R. No. 155 of 1905.) Buḍḍireḍḍipaṭṭi, Harur Taluk, Selam District. On the central shrine of the ruined Amman temple near Buḍḍireḍḍipaṭṭi.

p.hi: Vijayanagar Sāḷuva Dammadēva-mahārāya (Narasimha II), Raudri, Tai 1 = 1500 A.D.

summary.p: For the merit of Tipparasa-uḍaiyār, who was an executive agent of Narasaṇa-nāyakkar, who was himself the executive agent (kāryattukkukaḍavar) of the king, one Tāttireḍḍiyār gave the tax income of a village called Maṉṉayavārpaṭṭi, a hamlet of Tāḻainattam in Kundāṇi-sīrmai which was his nāyakkattaṉam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayenama . svasti samasta mahārācātirāca rācaparamecura Uttira dhakṣiṇa pūṟuvapaccima catusamuttiṟātipati nāracimhatEva mahāvaracu[ guḷa] kumārakammatevamahārāyar piṟitivirācciyam paṇṇā niṉṟa kālattil Avarkāryattukku kaṭavarāṉa naracaṇa nāyakkar kāriyattukku kaṭavarāna tipparaca Uṭaiyaṟku tammāka Iravuttiri varusam tai mācam1§kku Ātivārattil makara caṅkiṟānti puṇṇiya kālattil tāttiraṭṭiyār nammuṭaiya nāyakkattaṉamāṉa kuntāṇic cīrmaiyāṉa kāyalūrt stataḷamāṉa tāḻainattattilp piṭākaiyāṉa maṉṉayavārpaṭṭi tāḻai nattattu Uṭaiyārkum nācciyārkkum tirunantāviḷakkukkum naivettiyattukkumāka kuṭutta
taṉmacātaṉam Antak kiṟāmattukkuc cellum nañcai puñcai nāṟpāṅkellai meṉokkiya maram kīḻṉokkiya kiṇaṟum māvaṭaimaravaṭai
Digital edition of SII 41.156 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
